TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Cnrux Cinqlangan Sezirayrak qa linhuyan spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok == linhuyan qani ga qabax snsiy mwah prraw niwan llwax na lhuyan, squnun naha snsiy mbinah rayrak mwah msqun kbalay linhuyan na rmurux yaw na spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok. Cnrux Cinqlangan Sezirayrak qa linhuyan spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok, linhuyan qani ga qabax snsiy mwah prraw niwan llwax na lhuyan, squnun naha snsiy mbinah rayrak mwah msqun kbalay linhuyan na rmurux yaw na spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok. Puqing ppgleng qa lhuyan qani ga snsiy Rinsyocer. Qutux seng qesux kbhul qesux pgal qesux kawas cinrxan nqu lhuyan qan calay lalu nya ga lhuyan spung tqbaqan na ke'an, gaga ki kyoyic qa Genzyumin, knrtung cinlalu hiya ga san ALCD, saying seng ru pitu kawas laga wayal tliqan pyanga pinbawiq na yaw qa Sezi rayrak cqani.
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨnrux ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan s~ɕezirajrak qa linħujan s~ɕpuŋ tqβaq jaw na ɣenzjuminrok == linħujan qani ɣa qaβax s~ɕns~ɕij mwaħ prraw niwan llwax na lħujan, s~ɕqunun naħa s~ɕns~ɕij mβinaħ rajrak mwaħ ms~ɕqun kβalaj linħujan na rmurux jaw na s~ɕpuŋ tqβaq jaw na ɣenzjuminrok. ʦ~ʨnrux ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan s~ɕezirajrak qa linħujan s~ɕpuŋ tqβaq jaw na ɣenzjuminrok, linħujan qani ɣa qaβax s~ɕns~ɕij mwaħ prraw niwan llwax na lħujan, s~ɕqunun naħa s~ɕns~ɕij mβinaħ rajrak mwaħ ms~ɕqun kβalaj linħujan na rmurux jaw na s~ɕpuŋ tqβaq jaw na ɣenzjuminrok. puqiŋ ppɣleŋ qa lħujan qani ɣa s~ɕns~ɕij rins~ɕjoʦ~ʨer. qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul qes~ɕux pɣal qes~ɕux kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨinrxan nqu lħujan qan ʦ~ʨalaj lalu nja ɣa lħujan s~ɕpuŋ tqβaqan na keʔan, ɣaɣa ki kjojiʦ~ʨ qa ɣenzjumin, knrtuŋ ʦ~ʨinlalu ħija ɣa s~ɕan alʦ~ʨ*, s~ɕajiŋ s~ɕeŋ ru pitu kawas~ɕ laɣa wajal tliqan pjaŋa pinβawiq na jaw qa s~ɕezi rajrak ʦ~ʨqani.
S.FORM: == Cnrux Cinqlangan Sezirayrak qa linhuyan spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok == linhuyan qani ga qabax snsiy mwah prraw niwan llwax na lhuyan, squnun naha snsiy mbinah rayrak mwah msqun kbalay linhuyan na rmurux yaw na spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok. Cnrux Cinqlangan Sezirayrak qa linhuyan spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok, linhuyan qani ga qabax snsiy mwah prraw niwan llwax na lhuyan, squnun naha snsiy mbinah rayrak mwah msqun kbalay linhuyan na rmurux yaw na spung tqbaq yaw na Genzyuminrok. Puqing ppgleng qa lhuyan qani ga snsiy Rinsyocer. Qutux seng qesux kbhul qesux pgal qesux kawas cinrxan nqu lhuyan qan calay lalu nya ga lhuyan spung tqbaqan na ke'an, gaga ki kyoyic qa Genzyumin, knrtung cinlalu hiya ga san ALCD, saying seng ru pitu kawas laga wayal tliqan pyanga pinbawiq na yaw qa Sezi rayrak cqani.
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨnrux ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan s~ɕezirajrak qa linħujan s~ɕpuŋ tqβaq jaw na ɣenzjuminrok == linħujan qani ɣa qaβax s~ɕns~ɕij mwaħ prraw niwan llwax na lħujan, s~ɕqunun naħa s~ɕns~ɕij mβinaħ rajrak mwaħ ms~ɕqun kβalaj linħujan na rmurux jaw na s~ɕpuŋ tqβaq jaw na ɣenzjuminrok. ʦ~ʨnrux ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan s~ɕezirajrak qa linħujan s~ɕpuŋ tqβaq jaw na ɣenzjuminrok, linħujan qani ɣa qaβax s~ɕns~ɕij mwaħ prraw niwan llwax na lħujan, s~ɕqunun naħa s~ɕns~ɕij mβinaħ rajrak mwaħ ms~ɕqun kβalaj linħujan na rmurux jaw na s~ɕpuŋ tqβaq jaw na ɣenzjuminrok. puqiŋ ppɣleŋ qa lħujan qani ɣa s~ɕns~ɕij rins~ɕjoʦ~ʨer. qutux s~ɕeŋ qes~ɕux kβħul qes~ɕux pɣal qes~ɕux kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨinrxan nqu lħujan qan ʦ~ʨalaj lalu nja ɣa lħujan s~ɕpuŋ tqβaqan na keʔan, ɣaɣa ki kjojiʦ~ʨ qa ɣenzjumin, knrtuŋ ʦ~ʨinlalu ħija ɣa s~ɕan alʦ~ʨ*, s~ɕajiŋ s~ɕeŋ ru pitu kawas~ɕ laɣa wajal tliqan pjaŋa pinβawiq na jaw qa s~ɕezi rajrak ʦ~ʨqani.
